package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for admin_or_debug_endpoint_registration_mixed_into_public_router_setup: Operational endpoints registered alongside public routes with no clear boundary.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule000NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule000NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule000NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario000Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule000NegativeService, input Rule000NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
